queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between having no checking account and increased credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Loan purpose: purchase of radio or TV.
queries.question: Determinants of credit risk associated with loan purposes for radio or TV purchases indicating reduced risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Statistical analysis of the correlation between negative checking account balances and decreased credit default likelihood.
